---
title: "Calculating L-function (unweighted)"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries and set up

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# .libPaths(c("/enna/users/stfour/shreyar/Desktop/lib/", "/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/"))
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
})
```

```{r eval = F}
load("bootstrap.RData")
```

## Generate closePairs

```{r}
cells = colData(TcellsSub) |> as.data.frame()

imageList = split(cells, cells$imageID)

r = 100

imageResults = lapply(imageList, function(image) {
  image$cellID = factor(seq_len(nrow(image)))
  ow = Statial::makeWindow(image, window = "square")

  imagePPP = spatstat.geom::ppp(x = image$x,
    y = image$y,
    window = ow,
    marks = data.frame(cellType = image$majorityLabel, cellID = image$cellID))

  closePairs = spatstat.geom::closepairs(imagePPP, r, what = "ijd", distinct = FALSE) |> data.frame()

  cellTypes = imagePPP$marks$cellType
  names(cellTypes) = imagePPP$marks$cellID

  closePairs$cellTypeI = cellTypes[closePairs$i]
  closePairs$cellTypeJ = cellTypes[closePairs$j]

  closePairs$i = factor(closePairs$i, levels = imagePPP$marks$cellID)
  closePairs = as.data.table(closePairs)

  edge = Statial:::.borderEdge(imagePPP, r)
  edge = data.frame(i = factor(imagePPP$marks$cellID, levels = imagePPP$marks$cellID),
                    edge = 1 / edge)

  closePairs = dplyr::left_join(closePairs, edge[, c("i", "edge")], by = "i")

  list(closePairs = closePairs,
       area = spatstat.geom::area(imagePPP))
})
```

## Calculate L-function (unweighted)

```{r}
cellTypes = unique(cells$cellType)
cellTypes = cellTypes[!is.na(cellTypes)]
pairs = expand.grid(child1 = cellTypes, child2 = cellTypes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

Lfunc = bplapply(names(imageResults), function(imgID) {
  closePairs = imageResults[[imgID]]$closePairs
  area       = imageResults[[imgID]]$area

  counts = closePairs[, .(n = sum(edge)), by = .(i, cellTypeI, cellTypeJ)]
  counts = dcast(counts, i + cellTypeI ~ cellTypeJ, value.var = "n", fill = 0)

  pairResults = lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairs)), function(k) {
    child1 = pairs$child1[k]
    child2 = pairs$child2[k]

    if (!child1 %in% closePairs$cellTypeI | !child2 %in% closePairs$cellTypeJ) {
      return(data.frame(imageID = imgID, child1 = child1, child2 = child2, L = NA))
    }

    L = Statial:::.Lfunction(closePairs, counts, child1, child2, r, area)
    data.frame(imageID = imgID, child1 = child1, child2 = child2, L = L)
  })
  dplyr::bind_rows(pairResults)

}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = 20))

Lfunc = dplyr::bind_rows(Lfunc)
```

```{r}
cDat = colData(TcellsSub) |> as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::distinct(subject, imageID, biopsy_rejection_type, biopsy_timing,
                  patient_rejection_type, resolution_broad)

Lfunc = merge(Lfunc, cDat, by = "imageID")
Lfunc$cellType_pair = paste0(Lfunc$child1, "__", Lfunc$child2)

head(Lfunc)
```

```{r}
hist(Lfunc$L, main = "Distribution of unweighted L-function", xlab = "L-function")
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(Lfunc$L)) / nrow(Lfunc)
```

## Linear models

```{r warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
pairList = dplyr::distinct(Lfunc, child1, child2)

noWeightsModels = lapply(seq_len(nrow(pairList)), function(k) {
  child1 = pairList$child1[k]
  child2 = pairList$child2[k]

  dat = Lfunc |>
    dplyr::filter(child1 == !!child1, child2 == !!child2) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(L), !is.na(resolution_broad))

  if (length(unique(dat$resolution_broad)) < 2 | nrow(dat) < 5) {
    return(data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2, p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
  }

  fit = tryCatch(lm(L ~ resolution_broad, data = dat),
    error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2, p.value = NA, estimate = NA))
  }

  coef = summary(fit)$coefficients
  data.frame(child1 = child1, child2 = child2,
             estimate = coef[2, "Estimate"], p.value = coef[2, "Pr(>|t|)"])
})

noWeightsModels = dplyr::bind_rows(noWeightsModels)
noWeightsModels = noWeightsModels |> dplyr::rename(from = child1, to = child2)
noWeightsModels$p.adj = p.adjust(noWeightsModels$p.value, method = "BH")
```
